advantages.title: Our Advantages

i1Points.p1: simultaneous resolution of technological and legal aspects of projects, such as tokenization or mobile application development;
i1Points.p2: delivery of legal opinions substantiated by thorough technical assessments, ensuring their practical applicability;
i1Points.p3: legal, technological and compliance expertise. Without this synergy of technical and legal expertise, it is impossible to create solutions that are genuinely effective for clients.

advantages.i2Lead: Our services extend beyond documentation or consultation - we deliver holistic solutions that generate revenue:

i2Points.p1: we develop operational solutions ready for monetization through subscriptions or sales;
i2Points.p2: we take full responsibility for the outcome, ensuring both documentation accuracy and final operational functionality.

advantages.i3Text: We adapt our solutions to different jurisdictions while maintaining international standards.
advantages.i4Lead: Our team is dedicated to achieving your business objectives by delivering decisions that:

i4Points.p3: comply with all technical and legal requirements.

hero.title: Tokenization of premium real estate in a prestigious tourist destination
hero.subtitle: Launching a Security Token Offering (STO) for a community of 20 luxury villas and creating a digital token for real estate investment on blockchain.
hero.lead: The project enabled investors to participate in premium real estate ownership with minimal entry, using blockchain technology.

overview.title: Project Description
overview.text: A boutique community of twenty luxury villas located in a famous tropical destination (Mexico), in partnership with ULTP, launched a Security Token Offering (STO). This innovative project created a digital token that allows investors to co-own premium real estate through blockchain technology with minimum investments starting from USD 5,000.

solution.title: Solution
solution.text: Token issuance relied on advanced blockchain technologies to ensure:

items.i2: transparency

result.title: Result
result.text: The STO was presented at an international crypto and blockchain festival with an audience of over 50,000 investors. The project clearly demonstrated how tokenization can transform real estate investment, making it more accessible and efficient.

hero.title: Building an Innovative Blockchain Identity Platform
hero.subtitle: A solution to simplify and secure access to tokenized assets and DeFi services.
hero.lead: A unified, interoperable entry point that makes tokenization accessible for investors and businesses.

overview.title: Project Description
overview.text: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners created a transformational blockchain-based digital identity solution designed to simplify and secure access to tokenized assets and decentralized finance (DeFi) services. This innovative product offers a single, interoperable entry point so users can interact with a broad range of virtual assets, making tokenization accessible to both individual investors and businesses. The solution, currently in beta testing within a large blockchain network, eliminates repetitive verification processes and enables seamless navigation across offerings.

items.i2: ensures compliance with KYC and AML requirements
items.i4: creates a single entry point for working with digital assets

result.title: Result
result.text: Delivered to a global audience, the digital identity solution lays the foundation for future expansion, including support for additional blockchain networks and enhanced security features. Its launch demonstrates a commitment to bridging traditional finance and web3, enabling users to unlock new investment opportunities with transparency and efficiency. This project shows how advanced blockchain technology can reshape user interaction in digital finance, offering a scalable, secure, and user-friendly solution that paves the way for the future of tokenized assets.

hero.title: Subscription-based crypto education platform
hero.subtitle: Building a crypto learning platform with GDPR compliance and a mobile app launch.
hero.lead: The platform provides secure, subscription-based access to educational materials.

overview.title: Project Description
overview.text: The company developed a cryptocurrency education platform that provides subscription-based access to ensure a seamless, secure, and compliant user experience. The platform was created to offer enthusiasts an educational space and convenient access to materials and services. To ensure compliance, the project underwent comprehensive technical and legal review, following App Store Guidelines and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), as well as other applicable laws.

solution.title: Solution
solution.text: To deliver the project, the team completed:

items.i2: third-party service checks for GDPR compliance
items.i3: implementation of transparent user consent flows
items.i4: creation of an intuitive and secure interface

solution.outcome: This ensured a high level of privacy, security, and user trust.

result.title: Result
result.text: A successful App Store launch demonstrated the team’s ability to build a high-quality mobile app aligned with regulatory requirements and tailored for a global audience. The initiative highlighted the power of combining innovation with strict compliance, creating a safe and user-friendly platform that enables confident learning in the crypto space.

about.title: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners
about.lead: Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners is a project founded by Svitlana Rudiuk that combines legal, tax, technological, and compliance expertise to support projects in Web3, fintech, tokenization, and digital assets.

founder.title: Founder
founder.name: Svitlana Rudiuk
founder.role: Founder of ULTP · international tax and Web3
founder.text: Svitlana Rudiuk is the founder of Ukrainian Legal and Tech Partners and an expert in national and international taxation, business structuring, and Web3 solutions.
founder.experience: For more than 7 years, I have worked with tax, regulatory, and compliance matters, supporting clients in projects related to blockchain, tokenization, virtual assets, and international structuring.
founder.specialization: My practice covers tax planning, building holding structures, legal support for fintech and Web3 projects, and designing legal frameworks for launching new digital products.

web3.title: Expertise
web3.text: I support clients at every stage of projects: from legal and compliance analysis to structuring the model, obtaining crypto-asset service provider status, opening accounts, and building effective legal infrastructure.

about.speaker:
Alongside practical work, I speak at industry events, prepare publications and legislative initiatives, and mentor lawyers.

I work in Ukrainian and English, advise clients from different jurisdictions, and help adapt solutions to specific regulatory requirements.

i1.title: Structured Solution
i1.text: A single project model that combines legal, compliance, and technological expertise.

i2.title: Launch Readiness
i2.text: Solutions prepared for practical implementation, market entry, and further scaling.

i3.title: International Focus
i3.text: Support aligned with different jurisdictions, regulatory models, and the client’s business goals.

partners.title: Partners
partners.mary: InDevLab brings 7+ years of experience in data protection compliance, cybersecurity compliance, and IT infrastructure support. The team works in line with international standards for software development, IT infrastructure services, and information security processes.
partners.oleksandr: Mindtec brings 11 years of software development experience and delivers tailored solutions for fintech, crypto, and Web3 business needs.
partners.note: Our partner model combines legal, compliance, infrastructure, and software development expertise within one project, so the client receives an integrated solution rather than fragmented services.

hero.title: Privacy Notice
hero.lead: This notice explains how personal data is collected, used, and protected.

s1.title: 1. Data Controller
s1.p1: This privacy notice explains how personal data is collected, used, and protected.

items.i2: Activities: legal, advisory, compliance, and technology services

s1.p3: The Controller complies with applicable data protection laws, including GDPR (EU), U.S. federal and state privacy laws, as well as relevant privacy laws in Asian jurisdictions (for example, Singapore, Hong Kong, Japan).

s2.title: 2. Scope

items.i2: business partners and their representatives
items.i4: individuals contacting the Controller for professional services

s2.p2: It applies to individuals located in the EU, USA, Asia, and other jurisdictions.

s3.title: 3. Categories of Personal Data
s3.p1: The Controller may collect and process the following categories of personal data:

items.i1: identification data: first name, last name, position
items.i2: contact data: email address, phone number
items.i3: professional data: company name, role, type of activity
items.i6: technical data: IP address, browser type, access logs
items.i7: compliance-related data provided within legal or advisory services

s3.p2: Special categories of data are not collected unless required by law or voluntarily provided by the client.

s4.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
s4.p1: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:

items.i2: client communication and support
items.i4: compliance with legal and regulatory obligations

s4.p2: Personal data is not used for automated decision-making or profiling.

s5.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
s5.p1: For EU residents, data processing is carried out under Article 6 GDPR:

items.i2: compliance with legal obligations

s5.p2: For U.S. and Asian residents, processing is carried out in accordance with applicable laws in their jurisdictions.

s6.title: 6. Data Sharing and Disclosure
s6.p1: Personal data may be shared only where necessary and limited to:

items.i1: professional advisors and confidentiality-bound service providers
items.i2: accounting, legal, and compliance partners
items.i4: regulatory or governmental authorities where required by law

s6.p2: Personal data is not sold and is not disclosed for marketing purposes.

s7.title: 7. International Data Transfers
s7.p1: Personal data may be processed or stored outside the user's jurisdiction, including Ukraine, the USA, and other regions.
s7.p2: Appropriate safeguards are implemented, such as:

items.i2: data processing agreements compliant with GDPR where required

s8.title: 8. Data Retention
s8.p1: Personal data is retained only as long as necessary for:

items.i2: meeting accounting and regulatory requirements

s8.p2: Retention periods depend on the nature of services and applicable law.

s9.title: 9. Data Subject Rights
s9.p1: Depending on your place of residence, you may have the following rights:

items.i1: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, data portability
items.i2: withdrawal of consent
items.i3: lodging a complaint with a supervisory authority

items.i1: access, correction, or deletion of data
items.i2: opt-out of certain data uses where applicable

asia.title: Asian residents (Singapore, Hong Kong, Japan, etc.):

items.i1: access, correction, or deletion of data
items.i2: objection to certain processing where applicable

s9.p2: Requests can be sent to the contact email below.

s10.title: 10. Data Security
s10.p1: The Controller implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including:

items.i2: secure communication channels

s11.title: 11. Notice Updates
s11.p1: This notice may be updated from time to time to reflect changes in law or the Controller's activities. The latest version is always available upon request or on the official website.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.lead: These terms govern the use of legal, advisory, compliance, and technology services.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern the use of services provided by:

items.i2: Business activities: legal, advisory, compliance, and technology-related consulting services

s1.p3: By engaging with the services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you may not use the services.
s1.p4: These Terms apply to clients, prospective clients, business partners, and website users located in the European Union, the United States, Asia, and other jurisdictions.

s2.title: 2. Services
s2.p1: The services provided may include, but are not limited to:

items.i2: technology consulting and tokenization solutions
items.i5: other professional services agreed with the client

s2.p2: Specific service agreements may include additional terms, which take precedence over these general Terms.

items.i2: comply with applicable laws and regulations
items.i3: cooperate in a timely manner to enable the provision of services
items.i4: ensure that any information provided does not violate third-party rights

items.i1: Fees for services are set out in individual agreements or proposals.
items.i2: Invoices are payable according to the terms specified in the agreement.
items.i3: Late payments may incur interest or suspension of services.

items.i1: All information shared between the client and the service provider is treated as confidential.
items.i2: Confidential information may only be disclosed if required by law, regulatory authority, or with client consent.
items.i3: This confidentiality obligation survives termination of the service agreement.

items.i1: All intellectual property created by the service provider remains the property of the service provider unless explicitly assigned.
items.i2: Clients may use deliverables only for the purposes agreed in the service agreement.

items.i1: The service provider acts with professional care and in accordance with applicable laws.
items.i2: Liability is limited to direct damages caused by gross negligence or willful misconduct.
items.i3: The service provider is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

items.i1: Either party may terminate the engagement according to the terms of the service agreement.
items.i2: Upon termination, fees for services rendered up to the date of termination remain payable.

items.i1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Ukraine.
items.i2: Disputes will be resolved primarily through negotiation. If unresolved, disputes may be submitted to the competent court in Ukraine.
items.i3: For EU clients, GDPR rights and remedies remain unaffected.

items.i1: These Terms may be updated periodically.
items.i2: Clients will be notified of significant changes, and continued use of services constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

s11.title: 11. Contact
s11.p1: For questions regarding these Terms or the services, please contact:

footer.disclaimer2: All materials are protected by copyright law. Using and/or copying is permitted only with the consent of the website owner.

services.title: Services

delivery.text: We support the project at all stages.

tax.title: Taxation
tax.t1: Consulting on the application of tax legislation.
tax.t2: Analysis of business structures in view of tax legislation.
tax.t3: Recommendations on the most effective models for cross-border deals or business schemes and selection of suitable jurisdictions.
tax.t5: Development and support of optimal individual asset sale and purchase structures (business, real estate, intellectual property, etc.).
tax.t6: Consulting on transfer pricing and controlled foreign company regulations.
tax.t7: Consulting on international treaties to avoid double taxation and international tax information exchange.
tax.t8: Consulting and preparation of documents for tax benefits under applicable legislation.
